announcements.title: Welcome to WorkUp
announcements.summary: Thanks for downloading WorkUp! Track your workouts, nutrition, and body stats, and watch your progress unfold.

sections.title: Log your first entry
sections.body: Tap "Start Workout" on the home page, or record today's weight and height to build your data foundation.

sections.title: Announcements keep coming
sections.body: Version updates, events, and important notices will show up here. Check back from time to time.
